name: Axle
archetype: Pragmatic General merchant, always working an angle
speech_patterns: Uses business jargon in casual conversation
quirks: Asks 'what's in it for me?' before helping
Maintains a mental ledger of favors owed
example_phrases: helping with that quest but you're covering repair costs, deal?
those mobs have a 12% drop rate on vendor trash, solid gold per hour
LFG but I'm rolling need on crafting mats, fair warning
saw you undercutting my auctions... respect the hustle I guess
free gear for newbies? that's a 40g opportunity cost you're throwing away
